title: Rolson 12108 20oz One Piece Splitting Hand Axe Hatchet Splitter Outdoor Camping Professional,Yellow/Black & 10780 Diamond Shape Log Splitter, Gold
features: Product 1: Solid forged one-piece hand axe
Product 1: Integrated nail puller and 13mm nut driver
Product 2: Manufactured from drop forged and heat treated iron
Product 2: Ideal for splitting logs in four directions
Product 2: Designed for use with sledge hammer
description: Rolson 12108 20oz One Piece Splitting Hand Axe Hatchet Splitter Outdoor Camping Professional,Yellow/ Black Multi-Purpose: A compact hatchet which can both split and cut small logs is an ideal accompaniment for trades and serious campers. Large blade: Sharpened 75mm blade and large nock. Non Slip Grip: An ergonomic two-colour cushion grip made from non-slip material with a robust, handhold design. One-piece Construction: Drop forged, hardened and tempered steel for additional toughness and longevity. Balanced Use: Head to shaft ratio encourages better balance and reduces fatigue. Rolson 10780 Diamond Shape Log Splitter, Gold Rolson offer a wide range of tools that are suitable from everyday use by the DIY enthusiast to on-the-job professionals. Our seal of approval allows you to feel confident that your chosen product has been manufactured to international standards, which comes well presented in the unique Rolson branded packaging. Rolson are constantly aiming to increase and improve their catalogue by introducing the most exciting, innovative and reliable products possible without compromising on their values of quality and safety.
